generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving AGREE syntax errors reported by the validator.
Prioritize repairs that address unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations.
Use visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new architecture to fix AGREE errors; focus on contract adjustments.
Avoid using implementation-specific details in component type contracts.
Do not attempt to fix type errors by modifying AADL architecture.
irrelevant_topics: AADL structural extraction (component types, implementations, features, connections, properties, and owners)
AGREE assumption/guarantee placement in component types vs. implementations
